extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ Primož won the time trial by 13 seconds over CAMPENAERTS Victor, defending his overall lead to claim his second consecutive Tour de Romandie title.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIČ beat world hour record holder CAMPENAERTS by 14.6 seconds at intermediate check, revealing exceptional pre-Giro form.
GANNA Filippo led through intermediate check despite being pursuit specialist, showing time trial depth beyond track credentials.
ROGLIČ validated road stage wins with TT dominance, proving complete stage race capability pre-Grand Tour.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: Three wins including time trial suggests complete form package heading to Giro d'Italia, not single-discipline specialist
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Third overall by fractions confirms return to form after poor early season, credible Grand Tour contender again
rider_signals.CAMPENAERTS Victor: neutral: World hour record holder beaten by 13 seconds suggests ROGLIČ's TT level exceeds specialist benchmarks
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: positive: Leading intermediate check as pursuit specialist shows immediate transition to road TT excellence
